results.name: Oracle
results.key_finding: March 31 6 a.m. email + algorithmic targeting + $26M concurrent CFO award = canonical EMP/EQU/INT floor-adjacent event; -7.8 to 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical boundary).

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Dual-signal May 16: 294-drone residential targeting + 528-body remains-return — IHL-compliant gesture concurrent with IHL-violating conduct (methodologically novel).

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: al-Haddad strike (7+ killed including civilians) + Netanyahu 60% territorial admission — both methodologically novel: targeted-killing-with-civilian-collateral + territorial-control-admission-against-ceasefire-boundary.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Three-signal asymmetric-conduct reinforcement: 528-body remains-receipt under bombardment + 46 military-target precision retaliation + Zelenskyy 'entirely justified' proportionate framing.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: No new May 16 event; UN SR Andrews statement is amplification of pre-existing May 15 ACC downgrade; IWT suspension scored under Pakistan.

results.name: Meta Platforms
results.key_finding: Third 2026 layoff wave (8,000 effective May 20) under AI-pivot framing; sector-leading severance (18-month health coverage) prevents larger downgrade; Critical sustained.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Monsoon watch closed; IWT suspension is INDIA conduct not Pakistan conduct; documented as forward SYS-dimension watch for 240M downstream water-security risk; boundary sensitive (2.8pt below Critical/Developing).

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Daily junta airstrikes (58 in two-week period); Rohingya stranded second-order from India May 8 deportation — first canonical 'interconnected-floor-conduct-event'.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: WFP/FAO/UNICEF joint May 15-16 famine confirmation (Al Fasher, Kadugli + 20 risk areas); 19.5M acute food insecurity; highest-tier Tier-5 humanitarian evidence.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: IRC Emergency Watchlist rank 3 global; 73,000 facing starvation Upper Nile/Jonglei; 200K Akobo displaced; trend continuation.

results.name: xAI
results.key_finding: Carry-forward from May 14-15; continued international amplification (8+ countries, multi-AG); no new entity-specific event May 16.

results.name: Senegal
results.key_finding: Assessed May 15; no discrete May 16 event; monitor-only per scanner; math-hygiene 0.8pt composite-vs-dimension reconciliation flagged.

results.name: Agility Robotics
results.key_finding: No Agility-specific May 16 event; Hyundai union signal is sector-level not entity-level; boundary-adjacent at 60/61.

results.name: Apptronik

results.name: Nigeria

top_3_most_consequential.headline: First-baseline downgrade -7.8 to 20.6 / Developing (0.6pt above Critical boundary). Canonical instance of three methodology-novel categories: 'algorithmic-targeting-of-stock-option-holders', 'concurrent-executive-compensation-with-mass-elimination', 'liability-waiver-as-severance-condition'. The 6 a.m. email notification with no advance notice + algorithmic targeting + $26M CFO award concurrent with 30,000 worker eliminations + 95% net income growth = heaviest single EMP-dimension event in Fortune 500 cluster this year. Boundary case flagged.

Floor confirmation with two methodologically novel May 16 anchors: (1) al-Haddad targeted-killing with confirmed civilian collateral (wife, daughter, 7+ killed, 50+ injured) — 'targeted-killing-of-designated-militant-with-confirmed-civilian-collateral' category; (2) Netanyahu 60% territorial admission exceeding ceasefire-defined ~53% boundary — 'territorial-control-admission-against-ceasefire-defined-boundary' category. Head-of-state public admission of signed-agreement non-compliance is methodologically novel.

Floor confirmation with methodologically novel dual-signal day: 294-drone civilian residential targeting in Kherson + 528-body remains-return on same day. 'IHL-compliant gesture concurrent with IHL-violating conduct' is a new category — Russia pursuing both kinetic civilian pressure and IHL-protocol diplomatic gestures simultaneously. Documented as integrity-inconsistency signal, not floor-uplift. Three-day sequential pattern: 1,500+ drones + 56 missiles in ~96 hours post-ceasefire-expiry.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: algorithmic-targeting-of-stock-option-holders
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: EQU-dimension subcategory for layoffs in which selection criteria are alleged to systematically target workers with vested equity, optimizing for cost-cutting at the expense of long-tenured workers.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: concurrent-executive-compensation-with-mass-elimination
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.canonical_instance: Oracle CFO $26M stock award concurrent with 30,000 eliminations and 95% net income growth
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: INT-dimension subcategory for cases where executive stock awards flow concurrent with worker eliminations in the same quarter.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: liability-waiver-as-severance-condition
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: BND/B5 subcategory for cases in which transition support is conditioned on legal waiver, representing economic-duress consent.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: IHL-compliant-gesture-concurrent-with-IHL-violating-conduct
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.canonical_instance: Russia May 16 (294 drones at residential targets + 528-body remains-return same day)
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: Documents selective IHL engagement where actors pursue diplomatic IHL-protocol gestures concurrent with substantive IHL violations. Does not produce floor-uplift; documented as integrity-inconsistency signal.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: targeted-killing-of-designated-militant-with-confirmed-civilian-collateral
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.canonical_instance: Israel al-Haddad strike May 15-16 (7+ killed including wife and daughter, 50+ injured)
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: Distinct from indiscriminate civilian targeting; assesses proportionality-failure dimension of strikes nominally compliant with IHL principle but executing through civilian co-location.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: territorial-control-admission-against-ceasefire-defined-boundary
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.canonical_instance: Netanyahu May 15 60% territorial control admission against ~53% ceasefire boundary
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: Head-of-state public admission of non-compliance with signed agreement boundary; novel ACC-dimension category for cases where actor publicly documents the violation.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: interconnected-floor-conduct-event
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.canonical_instance: India naval deportation May 8 + Myanmar conflict-zone reception (Rohingya stranded)
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: Two or more floor-state actors jointly produce a compounded vulnerable-population harm through interaction of their separate conduct. Scored as conduct against EACH actor with no double-counting of harm.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: ai-pivot-displacement-wave
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.canonical_instance: Oracle + Microsoft + Meta = 46,750+ workers eliminated in 50 days under AI-pivot framing
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: Multi-entity industry-wide labor-elimination pattern under coherent strategic narrative (AI restructuring). Distinct from individual-strategic-layoff.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: externally-imposed-structural-water-security-risk
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.canonical_instance: Pakistan IWT-suspension exposure (240M downstream civilians; 80%+ agricultural water at risk)
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: Forward SYS-dimension watch category for downstream actors exposed to upstream-imposed structural risks. Scored as exposure for downstream party; as conduct for upstream party.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: parent-vs-product-entity-scoping
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.canonical_instance: Meta Platforms (Fortune 500) vs Meta AI (ai-labs) — same parent, different conduct surfaces
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: When organization has multiple-index presence, conduct events should be assigned to the index whose dimensional scope is most relevant. Workforce → Fortune 500; AI-product safety → AI Labs.

new_methodology_categories_surfaced.name: joint-multi-agency-UN-evidence (Tier 5 anchor)
new_methodology_categories_surfaced.description: Joint multi-agency UN evidence is structurally stronger than single-agency reports because it requires convergent agency-level confirmation. Should be formally weighted as Tier-5 anchor.

notes_for_review: Oracle first-baseline -7.8 delta is large for single-event-anchored assessment; algorithmic-targeting allegation is employee-testimony not legally confirmed; boundary-adjacent at 20.6 vs Critical floor 20.0 — human reviewer should consider whether dimensional weights are correctly calibrated.

Meta Platforms (Fortune 500) downgrade -1.5 to 9.4 is methodologically novel because the AI-pivot-displacement-wave pattern is being scored as a multi-entity systems-level signal (SYS -0.1); reviewer should consider whether this sector-pattern logic is properly applied.

Pakistan IWT-suspension boundary sensitivity: 17.2 sits 2.8pt below Critical/Developing boundary; any forward evidence of IWT-suspension-implementation-impact could trigger further downward movement risking 0-range approach.

Russia + Israel + Sudan + Myanmar + South Sudan all confirmed floor — methodology is consistent in handling floor-state actors with selective IHL engagement; documentation enrichment without floor-uplift.
Tesla index-presence issue: rotation evidence collected but cannot be turned into a change proposal without index entry. Flag for index curation.
Senegal math-hygiene 0.8pt gap: published 33.6 vs dimensional-sum 32.8. Sub-blocking; documented for reconciliation in next audit window.
